LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PENSCO TRUST COMPANY LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NOTHING IN THE CUSTODIAL AGREEMENT OBLIGATED DEFENDANT TO PERFECT THE OWNERSHIP INTERESTS OF PLAINTIFFS' INVESTMENTS OR CONFIRM THAT THE TRANSFER DOCUMENTS WERE SIGNED AND RECORDED. NOR WAS DEFENDANT REQUIRED UNDER THE CUSTODIAL AGREEMENT TO NOTIFY PLAINTIFFS THAT DEFENDANT HAD NOT RECEIVED ENDORSED COPIES OF NOTES OR DEEDS. INTERPRETING THE CUSTODIAL AGREEMENT IN THE WAY THAT PLAINTIFFS ADVOCATE WOULD IMPERMISSIBLY REALLOCATE THE PARTIES' RESPONSIBILITIES ET FORTH IN THE CUSTODIAL AGREEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR # 11918

Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PENSCO TRUST CO., INC'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES.
Appearances: Neil L. Shapiro of the Law Offices of Neil L. Shapiro (831.372.3700) appearing via Court Call for responding parties; Richard Munzinger of Shartsis Friese (773.7340) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: Granted. Defendant is awarded attorney fees and costs pursuant to the modifications stated on the record. This award shall be apportioned to each plaintiff based on the relative recoveries sought against Defendant per Exhibit A to the Complaint. Prevailing party to email a proposed form of order to the court at contestdept302tr@sftc.org. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Plaintiff'S Motion For A New Trial
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Continued To Apr-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NEIL L. SHAPIRO, TEL. NO. (831)372-3700 APPEARING FOR THE WALDROUP PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. LARRY J. LICHTENEGGER, APPEARING FOR BARBARA BARTINDALE BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. RICHARD MUNZINGER, TEL. NO. 421-6500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Plaintiff'S Motion For A New Trial IS denied in all aspect except as to the issue on some of the Plaintiffs who claim that their investments were not received by PENSCO TRUST COMPANY. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 4, 2012 TO DISCUSS THIS ISSUE AND THE COURT IS PREPARED TO SIGN AN ORDER ON THAT DATE. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER TO NARROW DOWN THE ISSUES. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =302/HK

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LARRY J. LICHTENEGGER, TEL. NO. 649-1226 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RICHARD F. MUNZINGER, TEL. NO. 773-7340 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT PENSCO TRUST COMPANY LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - Motion for summary judgment is granted. Nothing in the Custodial Agreement obligated defendant to perfect the ownership interests of plaintiffs' investments or confirm that the transfer documents were signed and recorded. Nor was defendant required under the Custodial Agreement to notify plaintiffs that defendant had not received endorsed copies of notes or deeds. Interpreting the Custodial Agreement in the way that plaintiffs advocate would impermissibly reallocate the parties' responsibilities et forth in the Custodial Agreement. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =302/HK
